# Preset Output Examples

These files are real offline `git-cliff --current` renders from the same deterministic tagged Git history. The fixture includes Unicode and shortcode Gitmoji, Conventional Commits, scoped and unscoped changes, a breaking change, dependencies, security, a revert, and release bookkeeping that must be skipped.

Provider-specific links use stable demonstration repositories. Online pull request and first-time contributor enrichment is intentionally absent so the examples remain reproducible.

- [`azure-devops-keepachangelog.toml`](./azure-devops-keepachangelog.md)
- [`change-ledger.toml`](./change-ledger.md)
- [`cocogitto.toml`](./cocogitto.md)
- [`dependency-audit.toml`](./dependency-audit.md)
- [`detailed-user-facing.toml`](./detailed-user-facing.md)
- [`detailed.toml`](./detailed.md)
- [`github-keepachangelog.toml`](./github-keepachangelog.md)
- [`github.toml`](./github.md)
- [`gitlab-keepachangelog.toml`](./gitlab-keepachangelog.md)
- [`keepachangelog.toml`](./keepachangelog.md)
- [`minimal-user-facing.toml`](./minimal-user-facing.md)
- [`minimal.toml`](./minimal.md)
- [`monorepo.toml`](./monorepo.md)
- [`scoped.toml`](./scoped.md)
- [`scopesorted.toml`](./scopesorted.md)
- [`statistics.toml`](./statistics.md)
- [`unconventional.toml`](./unconventional.md)

Regenerate the complete directory after changing the canonical parser or a preset template:

```bash
npm run presets:generate
npm run examples:generate
npm test -- test/preset-rendering.test.ts
```
